title: Grilled Greek Fish
description: A Mediterranean-inspired dish featuring grilled fish topped with a tangy Greek yogurt sauce.

ingredients.name: Fish fillets (4 oz)
ingredients.notes: Any white fish works well, such as tilapia or mahi-mahi

ingredients.name: Greek yogurt
ingredients.notes: Plain, full-fat yogurt for best flavor

instructions: Season fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Grill fish for 4-5 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, mix together yogurt, lemon juice, garlic, and dill in a small bowl.
Brush grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill fish until cooked through, about 8-10 minutes total.
Serve fish topped with yogurt sauce and garnish with fresh dill.
